lineage.Process: CreateFeatureclass E:\ArcGIS\青海24 海晏防治对象-画面图层 面 # 否 否 "PROJCS["CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_CM_102E",GEOGCS["GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000",DATUM["D_China_2000",SPHEROID["CGCS2000",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Gauss_Kruger"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",102.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",1.0],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]];-5123200 -10002100 450265407.001579;-100000 10000;-100000 10000;0.001;0.001;0.001;IsHighPrecision" # 0 0 0 # 与模板相同

SpatialJoin 海晏防治对象分布\海晏防治对象-画面图层 海晏防治对象分布\海晏_XYTableToPoint E:\ArcGIS\青海24\青海24.gdb\海晏防治对象画面图层_SpatialJoin 一对一连接 KEEP_ALL "Id "Id" true true false 6 Long 0 6,First,#,海晏防治对象分布\海晏防治对象-画面图层,Id,-1,-1;序号 "序号" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,海晏防治对象分布\海晏_XYTableToPoint,序号,-1,-1;行政区 "行政区划名称" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,海晏防治对象分布\海晏_XYTableToPoint,行政区划名称,0,254;行政_1 "行政区划代码" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,海晏防治对象分布\海晏_XYTableToPoint,行政区划代码,0,254;流域代 "流域代码" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,海晏防治对象分布\海晏_XYTableToPoint,流域代码,0,254;所在流 "所在流域" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,海晏防治对象分布\海晏_XYTableToPoint,所在流域,0,254;经度 "经度" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,海晏防治对象分布\海晏_XYTableToPoint,经度,-1,-1;纬度 "纬度" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,海晏防治对象分布\海晏_XYTableToPoint,纬度,-1,-1;防洪能 "防洪能力" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,海晏防治对象分布\海晏_XYTableToPoint,防洪能力,-1,-1;汇流时 "汇流时间" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,海晏防治对象分布\海晏_XYTableToPoint,汇流时间,-1,-1;备注 "备注" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,海晏防治对象分布\海晏_XYTableToPoint,备注,0,254" "包含 (Clementini)" # # #
